outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Total GEX is deeply negative (-15.91B combined). Dealers are short gamma, which will amplify price movements. Spot is significantly above the Gamma Flip, confirming instability.
outlook.summary: Market is in a volatile short-gamma regime. Heavy Put OI at 660 and 650 (Weekly/Monthly) creates a structural floor, while 0DTE activity targets 665 (Max Pain). The divergence between 0DTE bullishness (reverse_smirk) and Monthly bearishness (high PCR) suggests intraday compression followed by potential breakout.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest (36.7k 0DTE, 106k Monthly) and extreme Volume (442k 0DTE) creates a structural support trident across all expirations.
Dominant Put OI in Weekly (65k) and Monthly (138k) creates a magnetic support zone just above spot. Dealers must defend this level aggressively.
0DTE Max Pain and dominant Call OI (24k). Immediate magnet for expiry. Reverse smirk suggests calls are overvalued, capping upside.
Weekly and Monthly Max Pain level. Structural target for medium-term price convergence.
Secondary structural support with high Put OI in Weekly (63k) and Monthly (114k). Acts as safety net if 650 breaks.

outlook.summary: Market is in a volatile short-gamma regime with total GEX deeply negative. Dealers will amplify volatility. The 590 strike is a critical RESONANCE support battleground across all timeframes. A breakdown below 590 triggers accelerating sell-side hedging.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest alignment across 0DTE (7k), Weekly (24k), and Monthly (80k). Primary structural support.
Dominant Call Open Interest in Weekly (6k) and Monthly (47k). Hard resistance ceiling.
Max Pain level for 0DTE and Monthly expiries. Acts as a magnetic attractor for price action.
Highest OI strike in 0DTE (8784). Immediate tactical support below spot.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (7910). Intraday resistance.
Significant Put OI in Weekly (5k) and Monthly (59k). Secondary structural support.
Monthly gamma equilibrium point. Structural pivot zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected due to significant negative GEX (-1.03B) in MONTHLY expiration. Dealers short gamma will amplify price movements. Spot sits 2% above gamma flip, creating asymmetric downside risk.
outlook.summary: Market structure shows conflicting signals across expiries. 0DTE displays reverse_smirk (retail euphoria) while WEEKLY and MONTHLY show bearish smirk with expensive puts. Negative GEX concentration in longer-dated options suggests institutional hedging against downside. RESONANCE at 25000 creates massive overhead resistance. Primary supports at 24500 and 23800. Max Pain magnet at 24600 (0DTE) may attract price near-term before broader bearish resolution.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Same strike significant across ALL 3 expiries (0DTE: 151 OI, WEEKLY: 87 OI top CALL, MONTHLY: 989 OI). Also MONTHLY Max Pain. Ultimate institutional resistance zone.
Largest single OI concentration: 3989 CALL contracts in MONTHLY. Institutional ceiling above resonance zone.
CONFLUENCE 0DTE+MONTHLY CALL interest. High volume spike (726 VOL vs 61 OI in 0DTE) indicates unusual activity and dealer hedging pressure.
0DTE Max Pain level - price magnet for market makers. Near current spot, expecting gravitational pull.
Dominant MONTHLY PUT wall (751 OI). Bearish smirk (ratio 1.47) validates puts as expensive - strong institutional support.
MONTHLY gamma flip - sentiment equilibrium. Spot above = positive gamma zone but negative total GEX (-1.03B) creates volatility amplification risk.
Highest 0DTE PUT OI (452 contracts, 1273 VOL). Volume/OI ratio 2.8x indicates heavy institutional accumulation. Primary 0DTE support.
CONFLUENCE 0DTE+MONTHLY PUT interest (161 + 257 OI). Deep support with bearish smirk validation. Crash protection level.
